_comment: Saudi Aramco drone attack — OVX 35→49 spike on 2019-09-16. Exercises non-VIX symbol axis: same _TANH_SCALE=20.0 applied to crude oil vol, which has different baseline dynamics than equity vol.

source.description: CBOE Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index (daily close)

expected_band.rationale_pending_trader: Aramco drone attack — OVX jumped from ~35 range to 48.58 in one day (z=+11.2 against a calm 20-day window with std=1.32). Severity ~0.51 at scale=20. Band [0.45, 0.57] covers tanh_scale 18-22. Key axis: non-VIX symbol sharing the same _TANH_SCALE=20.0 — crude oil vol has structurally higher baseline (~33 vs VIX ~12-15) and different spike dynamics. If scale is wrong for OVX, this anchor catches it.
